MUST: GeoRootRouterView MUST redirect users based on geolocation and ServiceArea membership (RF-001)
GeoRootRouterView MUST use geo_data from request object populated by middleware (RF-001)
GeoRootRouterView MUST be implemented as CBV (RNF-004)
MUST_NOT: GeoRootRouterView MUST NOT implement geolocation logic inline (RNF-004)

MUST: TutorSelectionView MUST use LoginRequiredMixin + UserPassesTestMixin with test_func: user_type=='client' (RNF-002)
TutorSelectionView MUST call TutorProfileManager.get_tutors_by_location() — MUST NOT filter inline (RNF-004)
TutorSelectionView MUST be implemented as CBV with get_context_data() (RNF-004)
MUST_NOT: TutorSelectionView MUST NOT contain location-based filtering logic (RNF-004)
TutorSelectionView MUST NOT access tutor_profile inside loops without select_related (RNF-001)
TutorSelectionView MUST NOT be accessible to tutor users (RF-001)

MUST: ConfirmSessionView MUST use UserPassesTestMixin: user_type=='tutor' AND owns session (RNF-002)
CancelSessionView MUST validate user is tutor OR client associated with session (RF-005)
MeetingRoomView MUST validate user is tutor OR client associated with session (RF-005)
All session views MUST delegate lifecycle logic to academicTutoring.services (RNF-004)
All session views MUST be implemented as CBVs (RNF-004)
MUST_NOT: Session views MUST NOT contain status update logic inline (RNF-004)
Session views MUST NOT contain meeting URL generation logic (RNF-004)
Session views MUST NOT be accessible to unauthorized users (RNF-002)

MUST: Rating view MUST validate session is completed before allowing rating (RF-010)
Complaint view MUST be accessible to students, minors, and legal tutors (RF-010)
Complaint view MUST send complaint to Django admin for review (RF-010)
MUST_NOT: Rating view MUST NOT allow rating without completed session (RF-010)
Complaint view MUST NOT publish complaints without admin review (RF-010)
